title: Plumber Accessories
description: An addon that adds more accessories for the Herotime Addon by the Gravestone team!
body:
An addonpack for Palladium that adds extra accessories for the "Gravestone: Herotime" addon! So far this pack prvoides you with alternate Prototype Omnitrix skins via the accessory menu, the designs are either thought up by me or are made via suggestion.

Custom Accessories Included:
- Plumber Armor Alt
- Danny Phantom Alt
- Over Heaven Alt
- Red Ranger Alt
- Blue Ranger Alt
- Yellow Ranger Alt
- Pink Ranger Alt
- Black Ranger Alt
- Green Ranger Alt
- Argitrix Alt
- PikachuOnAcid's Alt
- Scarenve's Alt
- Saints Row Alt
- Bosatron's Alt
- Halloween Alt
- Requiem Alt
- Recalibrated Alt
- Ultimatrix Alt
- Completed Alt
- Albino Alt
- Fasttrack Fan Alt
- DemonGal6 Alt
- Kidneedswater Alt
- Unitrix Alt
- Invisible Alt
- Vantablack Alt
- Kirby Alt
- SplitLinkz Alt
- Tusk Act 4 Alt

CurseForge Link: 
- https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/plumber-accessories
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/plumber-accessories
